name: NodeGoat — mass assignment: whole req.body.memo inserted without an allowlist

provenance.note: Vulnerable side is verbatim-real NodeGoat master code (addMemos inserts the whole req.body.memo). NodeGoat ships no committed allowlist fix, so the safe baseline (-) side is a reconstructed field-allowlist insert; hence kind=synthesized.

notes: Attacker can set unintended fields on the memo document. NodeGoat mass-assignment pattern.
